---
title: "<i>Mothers in Council</i>"
---

## <i>Mothers in Council</i>

**Type:** periodical

### About

This quarterly was edited by CMY 1890-1901.  It ran until 1930.  It was aimed at the educated members of the Mothers’ Union, as distinct from <i>The Mothers’ Union Journal</i>, which was aimed at the working-class mothers.

### Letters Mentioning This Organization

- [To Mary Elizabeth Sumner, Feb 10th 1899](../letters/3396_To_Mary_Elizabeth_Sumner.html)
- [To the Countess of Glasgow, Sept 25th 1898](../letters/3381_To_the_Countess_of_Glasgow.html)

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
